perspective.title: 3D-fold / perspective / z-composite
perspective.note: Camera-bearing caps isolate the perspective projection (Y/X fold, Z push) vs FCP. Camera-less would be a FALSE FAIL (headless!=GUI); every persp.* cap inserts a real Camera so headless is a valid oracle. Minimized Switch/Smear are node-level real-slug repros.
perspective.oracle_note: FIXED 2026-07-23: the synthetic bare-camera FOLD caps were an INVALID oracle (Camera+NO-Replicator plane-fold is GUI-orthographic while headless folds — headless!=GUI, proven by OZViewer::viewIsOrthographic + the ROADMAP Reflection/Color_Planes dead-end). Removed them. The VALID perspective-projection oracle is a GENUINELY-3D scene where headless~GUI: 3D_Rectangle (camera + 25 clone layers; headless 32 dB vs GUI = trustworthy per ROADMAP). Re-minimized with `--protect Camera,Clone Layer` (+ ancestor-chain protection) -> Perspective__3D_Rectangle_cam RETAINS the camera + 25 clone layers (exercises perspective.ts/z-composite.ts; 13.68 dB mean / 8.89 worst vs headless FCP). This is where the perspective subsystem's dB deficit is measurable against a real oracle. Movements__Switch (Rig/Link) is kept as a secondary node-level repro.

replicator.title: Replicator / clone-grid
replicator.note: The replicator pinwheel/grid is barely composited (ROADMAP: 'broken single-tile spin on black' vs FCP's full multi-blade replicator). Minimized Clone_Spin/Concentric/Video_Wall are the node-level FCP repros. Caps pack builds a minimal Replicator grid vs FCP.
replicator.oracle_note: FIXED 2026-07-23: the old minimized Video_Wall/Clone_Spin/Concentric cases had their Replicator scenenodes STRIPPED by `fct minimize` (parsed to 0 replicator layers). Re-minimized with `--protect Replicator,Sequence Replicator,Replicator Cell` -> Video_Wall_rep RETAINS 14 live replicator layers (engine replicator.ts IS exercised; 9.39 dB mean / 7.04 worst vs headless FCP). NOTE: Clone_Spin is a FRAMING-CAMERA slug (0 replicators — 11 image drop-zones + framing camera) and Concentric is a CLONE-LAYER slug (0 replicators) — neither exercises replicator.ts; they belong to the perspective/framing path. So the single true replicator-node oracle is Video_Wall_rep. The pinwheel fix may still be cross-lane (camera framing), but replicator.ts changes are now MEASURABLE.

panels.title: kinetic-panel / gradient / mask
panels.note: Panel layout + image-mask reveal + gradient generator. Minimized Lower/Slide_In are node-level FCP repros. NOTE: Light_Sweep/Up-Over crash headless FCP (SIGSEGV) so those lack a headless oracle — use the minimized cases + caps, not those slugs directly.
